name: Auto Clicker
description: Automate mouse clicks at a set interval, with a global hotkey to start and stop from anywhere. Click at your cursor or a fixed spot, single or double, left/middle/right button, repeat forever or a set number of times.
details:
Set a click interval down to the millisecond, pick left, middle or right mouse button and single or double clicks, then choose where to click: wherever your cursor currently sits, or a fixed point you capture with the on-screen picker. Repeat forever or for an exact number of clicks.

A global hotkey (F6 by default, rebindable) starts and stops clicking even while another window has focus, so you can automate clicks in a game or app without switching back to luma.
